be aware that it's home to uniquely del food. Based on the texts, what would the author of Text 2 most likely say in response to the 'underlined
claim in Text 1? 'A. Many people worked together to help Belo Horizonte be recognized by UNESCO, but chefs deserve the most credit for Belo

Chorioactis geaster, a species of musheoom that makes a distinctive hissing sound when it releases its spores, is an clusive fungus that has been
observed only in Texas and Oklahoma in the US and in the Miyazaki and Nara Prefectures in Japan, Scientists aren't entirely sure why C. geaster is
distributed in this way (genetic analysis reveals that the US and Japanese strains diverged 19 million years ago), but the mushroom appears to be
very selective: ici typically found on the decaying stumps and roots of only a few tree soe ss that are abundant in these areas, 'Which choice best

of total household fuel use fell bby more than 90 percent between 2000 and 2015; such shifls are often explained by 'appeal to the energy ladder, a
model holding that fuel choice is mediated mainly by household income (specifically, high-technology fuels displace solid fuels as incomes rise).
Alem Mekonne n and Gunnar K&hlin's study of fuel use in Ethiopia shows this 'model to be reductive, however: household fuel use was
heterogeneous, flexible, and influenced by several factors, including the local availablity of different fuel sources, 'Which choice best describes the

text is an excerpt from a letter by Lady Howard to Evetina's guardian, Reverend Villas, in which Lady Howard discusses an upcoming trip to
London planned by her daughter 'Mrs, Mirvan's family. It is very eamestly [the Mirvans'] wish to enlarge and enliven their party by the addition of
your amiable ward, who would share, equally with her own daughter, the care and attention of Mrs. Mirvan, Do not start at this proposal; it s time
that {Evelina} should see something of the world. When young people are too rigidly sequestered from it, their ively and romantic imaginations
paint io them as a paradise of which they have been beguiled; but when they are shown it properly, and in due time, they see it such as it really is,
equally shared by pain and pleasure, hope and disappointment. Based on the text, Lady Howard would most likely agree with which statement
about Reverend Villars? 'A. Although the manner in which he has raised Evelina is in many ways exemplary, hie has been misguided in shielding
her from the influence of other young people, B, Although his desire to guard Evelina from unscrupulous people is commendable, his general
mistrust has led him to be unduly wary of the Mirvans. C. He is overly protective of Evelina, wha would likely benefit from a greater variety of

experiences than she has had thus far . He has imparted to Evelina his own idealist -view of the world, which results in her! ng unprepared to face
inevitable disappointments. gene Rose BSeeRHEN ae RAGSRNARUAEH, hom SHH Many music streaming services also function as social
